The CFO, as Trustee, is responsible for making sure that doesn't happen; \- The CFO is a member of Florida's Cabinet which gives them oversight over important issues like voting rights restoration, land use and conservation, veterans affairs, utilities management and so much more. name: The White House
subject: 5 ways the new tax code will be better
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe4336a72d9e5305159bfe054c0aa5cab14911f97c635cddf35edaaf6c922783c6dfb178211c5f39ad9877e1389a42fa97466) The White House • April 17, 2018
## Driving the Day
President Donald J. Trump will host Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe in Florida today. The President has a strong personal relationship with Prime Minister Abe, and two topics will lead the discussion: preparation for U.S. talks with North Korea and America’s recent moves to fix trade deals. |
---
|

## 5 ways the new tax code will be better
**Today is the deadline to file 2017 Federal income taxes.** It also marks the last time that taxpayers will have to deal with America’s old, broken tax code. Under the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act that President Trump signed in December, hardworking Americans will keep more of what they earn in 2018 and beyond.
**Five big changes stand out** : 1) Lower tax rates for Americans across the board; 2) a nearly doubled standard deduction; 3) a doubled child tax credit to help families, along with better saving options for education; 4) a simpler process to make filing taxes less of a headache; and 5) relief from the Affordable Care Act’s ineffective mandate.
**On the business side, tax reform is unleashing growth**. Small business confidence surged to a record high following the passage of tax cuts, and it remains at historically high levels. Employers are ready to expand—good news for workers as the unemployment rate remains at a 17-year low of 4.1 percent.
[President Trump’s tax cuts are generating greater economic opportunity for all.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe4337cc8c0241c2ff13173e0011b448e2ef1d8f683f396d9c2eaa58b11eebfd056b59c985a797db3dddded19080bb949a073) [**(SHARE THIS)**](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe433c49c2d3f9f98d903616446fcb201a42fd4f2128518c9e913340a29a161d2f2318bd50a5bfaf0ddeb769c8b524f2f4d9a)
**Watch** : [The President talks tax cuts with Hispanic-American business leaders in Florida](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe43317736230db160b24f7faa0f66ee71e93ef23511f34e3a808296350132e58db9e5afa83677a2b8b11d2edbe2d8d8b6cd8)

---
|

## Restoring America’s legacy in space
**Space exploration “is essential to the very character of America,"** Vice President Mike Pence told leaders at the 34th Space Symposium in Colorado Springs yesterday. “President Trump has been working to keep his promise to restore America’s proud legacy of leadership in space.” Space exploration is crucial for both national security and national prosperity, the Vice President said.
**He also announced the next chapter for America in space.** The National Space Council, which the Vice President chairs, has developed the first thorough space traffic management policy. It will address a congested space environment of more than 1,500 active satellites—and thousands more inactive ones and spacecraft fragments. “A stable and orderly space environment is critical,” Vice President Pence said.
[Watch the Vice President’s space announcement on Twitter. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe433cfba152c41d461f52c21c2187f1ab38a1e507b0df6052d80175e7ff95dc4a585ac5f22ac523de1c935579fc4ef134292)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
First Lady Melania Trump visits the “Prescribed to Death” opioid memorial

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe433589fb8b9ff78e69fae494d613680da84a5373d82a8923a892861087e47de23661184aa5f19dfa59a734f040c1c8bafa9) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=851c031985fbe4334a2ef757349d7b9b971c68359c028e2d218e7f4dbba91324a12465dea6f7e1a8bc372492136927c528d90a12995e64f2) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43e600b283f9f0e56c964e107d94d10ed23b202e9435f24fd8880d8bde2e97cfabb9c30a6a68e1a99bccf3d15f0650c2b39e7f6aa6a80b343)
---

Friends: It has been a great honor to serve as Campaign Co-Chair for Dr. Nina Ahmad since she first announced her candidacy. I have known Nina for many years and can attest to her effectiveness as a campaigner and thoughtfulness as a leader. She stands apart in her current race as the candidate who will bring a global perspective to Pennsylvania, bringing a focus on inclusion and progress when it comes to jobs, education, and the economy. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wiaS5FozbkvFmmw1TulYh5Va3VNj27fABc63nNZRBdw=/jVL4e7EzBpgeud6kkx5mBjBZWrVXTcMPpizVU0vs2tQ=) Pennsylvania's primary election is May 15th and we have less than a month to ensure she has the resources she needs to cross the state, meeting voters and spreading her message. It is no easy task but I know Nina is up to the challenge. Nina will be in Washington, DC today to meet with leaders from the Feminist Majority Foundation. There is a reception to follow, hosted by myself and other members of the Asian American Action Fund. [**If you are in town, please consider joining us to meet this exceptional candidate and lend her your support. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/wiaS5FozbkvFmmw1TulYh5Va3VNj27fABc63nNZRBdw=/bgTUoCigYTb7_qaVvI8X8DnUK7kuezlP1KA5fAU2OY0=) If you cannot attend,[ **I ask that you help her by making a contribution here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wiaS5FozbkvFmmw1TulYh5Va3VNj27fABc63nNZRBdw=/jVL4e7EzBpgeud6kkx5mBjBZWrVXTcMPpizVU0vs2tQ=) and sharing this information with your friends and family. Her victory in the May 15th primary will be an historic one and a sign of great progress forward for our country. Please give a gift today! name: John Kasich
subject: It's tax day 😟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
Let's be honest, nobody likes tax day. We make peace with it
because we know that it's our civic duty to chip in and do our
part to support this great idea we call America.

Peter, let's be honest, nobody
likes tax day.

We make peace with it because we
know that it's our civic duty to chip in and do our part to
support this great idea we call America - and to ensure that our
society has the necessary funds to provide for our brave service
members, our roads, teachers, public safety officers, and the
thousands of other things that help make America the greatest
nation in history.

But there's also one thing that
eats away at all of that. It's the mismanagement of how our tax
dollars are used and the assumption that debt is the answer.

Our national debt recently
crossed $21 TRILLION and counting - and we're on pace to reach
$22 trillion in a year. We hit $20 trillion just last September
and $19 trillion in 2016!

Durham, N.H. Town Hall - 2/3/16

That is a staggering
mismanagement of our government, and future generations of
Americans will pay dearly for the negligence of our elected
leaders!

I did the best I could to raise
this issue during the 2016 campaign but we must ramp up our
efforts to draw attention to this critical issue. Can I count on
your support?

The funds we raise go directly
into the tools we use to carry this message and others that are
getting more and more attention every day. Please consider
chipping in whatever you can to help.

Thank you for all that you're
doing.

-John

for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

| | Friend,
Last Thursday, I had the opportunity talk with Fox 5 DC about their report on Dr. Kevin Maxwell's secret pay raises for executive leadership at Prince George's County Public Schools. While the salary amounts reported are on par with the region, raises are usually given on par with teachers publicly. Unfortunately, that did not happen here. From big payoffs to school board members who oversee hiring decisions to grade reporting scandals, our current education leaders are enabling an unethical culture in our school system. If elected as Prince George's County Executive, I will advocate for restoring our elected school board and raising teacher pay. I can't make this vision a reality without you. [Will you support my campaign for County Executive with a donation of $10 or more? ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff01/767134fb/5c9c9808/43382089/1054777232/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pgschools") I'm ready to clean house--and I know so many of you are, too. I'm the only candidate in this race who has shown that I can't be bought by anyone. I'll bring that same approach to cleaning up our school system. I'll fight to make it more transparent and I'll fight to invest in our teachers and students, but I can't fight alone. [I hope you will consider supporting my campaign by chipping in $10 or more. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff01/767134fb/5c9c9808/43382089/1054777232/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pgschools") Thank you again for your continued support. Together, we can build strong public schools for our children.
Donna

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tax Day: The fight against terrible spending of your tax dollars isn’t over
body:
| | There is something we can do
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FVdsa25u&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180417p2a01&n=1)
| Peter, Did you see the survey I sent you on Friday? The results were fascinating. Thousands of people took our survey and 99.27% believe President Trump should use his rescission authority. President Trump could use this powerful tool to eliminate wasteful spending recently passed in the budget bill and to defund Planned Parenthood from receiving federal taxpayer money. If you missed it, let me explain the President’s rescission authority. It’s a special Presidential power that would allow the President to submit a proposal to cancel specific portions of the budget bill’s funds. The proposal is then sent to both chambers of Congress who must affirmatively agree to the proposal within 45 days or all the funds will be spent as appropriated in the budget bill. Since Republicans still control the House and the Senate it is very likely that President Trump’s rescissions would receive the needed support to pass Congress. The Impoundment Control Act of 1974 limits debate in the Senate on any rescission bill to no more than 10 hours meaning a filibuster is not permitted. This is important because it is in the Senate where the filibuster is often used to avoid taking a vote. President Trump could not only use this power to eliminate wasteful spending out of the budget bill, but he could also use this power to defund Planned Parenthood. A direct promise the President made to the American people. We asked what you thought of this authority at the President’s disposal and you overwhelmingly supported his use of rescission authority. **So we believe now is our time to unite and make our voice heard.** **Peter, send a brief message to President Trump asking him to do as President Reagan did and use his rescission authority to make greatly needed changes to the recently passed budget.** [I promise it will only take two minutes of your time to send this quick note to the White House. We have the message already prepared for you to edit or just send off!](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FVdsa25u&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180417p2a01&n=2) It’s more important than ever that we don’t become comfortable with the status quo. President Trump needs to know that people of faith are not satisfied with a budget bill that spends federal taxpayer money on abortion AND further burdens our children and our grandchildren with out of control spending. [](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FVdsa25u&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180417p2a01&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180417p2a01&n=4)
---

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Protect Your Vote 2018: Unaffiliated Primary Voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
Friend,
Primaries for the 2018 elections are in full swing all around the country. However, because of inconsistent and complicated rules that determine who can and can't vote in party primaries, millions of Americans will not be able to vote and have their voice heard.
Only 27% of registered voters identify as Democrats, while 25% identify as Republicans. [**Nearly half (46%) of all Americans do not identify with a major political party. This means that in closed primary states, almost half of the eligible voters can be excluded from voting in the primaries.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac2d/bed43eb/5446b128/75fe7a73/2584183746/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/unaffiliated-primary-voters")
For six weeks, the Sanders Institute and Founding Fellow Senator Nina Turner are looking at the most glaring issues in our voting system. This week, we are addressing the disenfranchisement of unaffiliated primary voters.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac2d/bed43eb/5446b128/75fe7a73/2584183746/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/unaffiliated-primary-voters")
The disenfranchisement of so many independent voters is a clear demonstration of the negative effects of the power of party establishments. **We must increase voter participation and make it easier for all to engage in the political process.**
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute Team
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac2d/bed43eb/5446b128/75fe7a72/2584183746/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180417")**
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401

name: Joe
subject: 12 zeros
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Tax Day is no one's favorite day, but this year it really stings. That's because when Mitch McConnell and his gang passed their big tax law last year, they cheated the American people. |
---

| | Peter,

Tax Day is no one's favorite day, but this year it really stings. That's because when Mitch McConnell and his gang passed their big tax law last year, **they cheated the American people**.

They promised to focus on cutting taxes for regular families -- but at the end of the day, it's the corporations and the wealthy who got the biggest break. Now the deficit is ballooning, health insurance premiums are rising, and they're even talking about cutting Social Security and Medicare to pay for it all! It makes me furious.

**But I 'll tell you this: I promised Hoosiers that I would never stop fighting to protect their Social Security, Medicare, and health care. _And that 's exactly what I plan to do._**

I need your help, though. The same powerful special interests that supported McConnell's tax law are now trying to push me out of office. **Will you make a donation to make sure I can stay in the Senate to keep fighting for you?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2003/7377f838/3e38dc11/51fab22e/726596711/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-taxday?express_lane=true&refcode=20180417.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2003/7377f838/3e38dc11/51fab229/726596711/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-taxday?express_lane=true&refcode=20180417.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2003/7377f838/3e38dc11/51fab228/726596711/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-taxday?express_lane=true&refcode=20180417.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2003/7377f838/3e38dc11/51fab22b/726596711/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-taxday?express_lane=true&refcode=20180417.1nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2003/7377f838/3e38dc11/51fab22a/726596711/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-taxday?refcode=20180417.1nd")**
Once I saw the final bill, I knew I had to vote against the McConnell tax law, and the numbers show that was the right call. According to the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office, because of the tax law, the annual federal budget deficit will reach _$1 trillion_ \-- that's 1 with 12 zeros, every single year -- by 2020. What's more, many who have health insurance through the individual marketplaces are set to see their premiums increase by an average of 34% this year.

And this headline from the _Washington Post_ shows exactly what's wrong with the law: "The richest Americans get a $33,000 tax break under the GOP tax law. The poorest get $40." That's just crazy! I was sent to Washington to fight for the little guys -- _not_ just to make the super rich even richer. Too many hardworking Hoosier families are still struggling to make ends meet, and if McConnell is able to slash our Social Security and Medicare it'll get even worse.

I'm going to fight tooth and nail to stop him, Peter, but **I need your support. The special interests are looking to punish my vote against their tax law by spending millions of dollars to defeat me. It 's going to be the toughest race I've ever had, but I know we can win if you step up.**

subject: Far too long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

Friends,

It's simple: Florida's families deserve a tax system that doesn't disproportionately help the richest corporations and the ultra-wealthy. But this Tax Day, Florida's richest corporations are going to take home even more sacks of money while working families barely scrape by, all thanks to an even more unbalanced system.

It's unacceptable -- which is why when I'm Governor, we'll do something about it. Under my "Fair Share for Florida's Future" Plan, we're going to invest $1 billion in our public schools, students, teachers, and workforce -- all by asking our richest corporations to invest a fraction of their windfall under this new law.

**[These are the types of progressive investments that our state needs -- not more giveaways. But it's only going to happen if we take action, so will you add your name and support a Fair Share for Florida's Future?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30eb/9e00690/44654d32/24027f55/1820584990/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-fair-share-for-florida-s-future?utm_campaign=em18_180417_TaxDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em18_180417_TaxDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_content=2+-+These+are+the+types+of+progressive+inves")**

The GOP's tax cut for corporations is paid for with the work equity of our teachers, firefighters, custodians, bus drivers, police officers, construction workers, and the working class people of our state and country.

That's why my plan calls for rebuilding our public schools, paying teachers a minimum starting salary of $50,000, investing in early childhood education programs, and investing in SHOP 2.0 and vocational training to help get workers the training they need for higher paying jobs.

For too long, Florida Republicans have forced working people to pay too heavy of a tax burden, instead of asking the richest corporations to pay their fair share -- so it's time we put an end to it.

**[Add your name now and stand with me to demand a Fair Share for Florida's Future.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30eb/9e00690/44654d32/24027f54/1820584990/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-fair-share-for-florida-s-future?utm_campaign=em18_180417_TaxDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em18_180417_TaxDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+and+stand+with+me+to+d")**

Thank you,

Andrew

body:
If you can believe it, next year will be completely different when it comes to taxes, thanks to President Trump's historic tax reform.

Did you file your taxes, Friend? It’s Tax Day.

If you can believe it, next year will be completely different when it comes to taxes, thanks to President Trump's historic tax reform.

But this year, our federal taxes serve as a reminder of the past, when Washington insiders chose to serve special interests instead of cutting taxes for American families.

It's refreshing to see how much Trump was able to get done on taxes. He set his mind to it, and he delivered! I'm sure the thousands of families who received raises and bonuses are grateful.

But Friend, tax reform is at risk.

Democrats are promising repeal if they regain the majority in the House and Senate. That makes it more important than ever that strong conservative candidates like me who will win and make sure DC keeps YOUR taxes low.

[KEEP TAXES LOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=acbbb65eb8f14975888f313085cfb614&_e=Hl4Gs_Ni_T8Ke2ZIZeSJGpeGk0nbJZqFBBwX7NZMDDM7iD4G9XbA7f7oXU0ZUfGK7b5fy2tPjsL0LywfjLBKS_HBVtKrLFq0NhkLdJvoSQAr-Jf1rYoa1cwYlP3V7W7c26vD6_sozkMgNg4lWHRNxf3J6G9wv5M8ZMT02RNq9DO_jpA5LYJZs2bIJe731vLZUskdUNavddv48qtC_js7gUhn-UNox-o77_I2uNdZAClMGEjue5qGxoypG-u6eE2hSMOcEYnzkGRA8glwEqLtUxEKwgvDdRpOZm7bAYk0VABTz3dtL6N5IG3Vjv9aEq2MYUXPWNSOyukYFlHt5FGrjciBjYaWNiTs72TpPOCiOsfnm2_FJqBJqWqpMLzwJ0DTCp94YIYalLfM9lfXAAFQng%3D%3D)

clean_body: If you can believe it, next year will be completely different when it comes to taxes, thanks to President Trump's historic tax reform. Did you file your taxes, Friend? It’s Tax Day. If you can believe it, next year will be completely different when it comes to taxes, thanks to President Trump's historic tax reform. But this year, our federal taxes serve as a reminder of the past, when Washington insiders chose to serve special interests instead of cutting taxes for American families. It's refreshing to see how much Trump was able to get done on taxes. He set his mind to it, and he delivered! I'm sure the thousands of families who received raises and bonuses are grateful. But Friend, tax reform is at risk. Democrats are promising repeal if they regain the majority in the House and Senate. That makes it more important than ever that strong conservative candidates like me who will win and make sure DC keeps YOUR taxes low. Friend, I will always stand for cutting taxes, whether it's in Washington, or Madison. For this special Tax Day, I put together a petition to KEEP TAXES LOW, and I’m hoping you’ll sign it to commemorate this day. Wisconsin taxpayers have had to foot the bill for too many of Washington's failed special interests’ problems. We don't want to do it again. Sign to keep taxes low: Thanks, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: Ryan worried about tsunami
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:

| | News broke last week that Speaker Paul Ryan will retire this year. He worried about the "Blue Wave" coming in November...a political tsunami. So, he'd rather call it quits than lose his Speakership. It's easy to think this is good news. Paul Ryan won't be in the House to crusade against Medicare as we know it. He won't be able to continue to support Trump's harmful and dangerous agenda. But make no mistake: **Even though Paul Ryan is walking out the door, it doesn't mean we are free and clear.** From President Trump to Mitch McConnell to the Koch brothers, there are plenty of right-wing Republicans ready to force through an anti-middle class agenda. And Paul Ryan can continue to raise money, in office or out. [_**Our work doesn't end because Paul Ryan is leaving. In fact, we must work harder to fight all the forces that want to help their rich friends at the expense of our seniors and middle class families.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ff4/622b7b5b/1a57c9e9/307b895b/465611051/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180413?refcode=dwse180413_m&recurring=true&amount=5") [_**How? We must continue growing our grassroots network to organize, inform and turnout our voters. You can help by making a contribution today.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ff4/622b7b5b/1a57c9e9/307b895b/465611051/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180413?refcode=dwse180413_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie

subject: hard hit

| | | Friend,

As tens of thousands of New Mexican households prepare to file their tax returns, Republicans are still peddling the disastrous tax bill they passed late last year.

Since then, it's become even clearer how bad the Republican tax giveaways really are for working New Mexicans.

My Republican colleagues sided with their donors and corporate interests and rushed to pass a bill that gives the wealthiest five percent of Americans 99 percent of the benefits. That's not a middle-class tax cut, no matter how Republicans spin it.

[**That 's why I'm raising my voice against the economic games Republicans continue playing. On this Tax Day, will you join me and say ENOUGH to Republicans' dangerous policies?**](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/condemn-the-tax-bill?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+raising+my+voice+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1")

[SIGN ON ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/condemn-the-tax-bill?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+ON+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1")
Republicans shrugged their shoulders when my Democratic colleagues and I sounded alarm bells about the devastating financial impact on our national debt and deficit.

But last week, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office announced the annual budget deficit will top $1 trillion in 2020 -- and the national debt will soar to $33 trillion in 2028.

**Because of Republicans ' reckless tax bill, Congress will be forced to gut funding for Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, infrastructure, public schools, and the military.**

That's an unsustainable and immoral burden being placed on the backs of working families, our children, and our communities.

I was ready to work across the aisle in the Senate to craft a tax bill to genuinely lower taxes for working and middle-class families. But Republicans fought for their donors instead.

[**As we prepare for the first Tax Day since the Republican bill was passed, we 're seeing the horrendous consequences. Will you join me and stand against the economic games Republicans insist on playing?**](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/condemn-the-tax-bill?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+As+we+prepare+for+the+first+Tax+Day+sinc&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180417_1_1")

Thanks for your support.

Martin

subject: Only 27% of Americans support it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It's Tax Day and Americans are concerned about how the new tax law will affect them. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc482f3/c1f7015/690c1010/11430ba3/1643178233/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tax-day?utm_source=ema_2018-04-17_tax-day&refcode=ema_2018-04-17_tax-day&utm_campaign=tax-day&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Today, while millions of Americans file their taxes, they're also worried about how the GOP's catastrophic tax law will impact them next year. They're worried about how their taxes will go up to pay for cuts for the richest and most connected corporations. They're worried the law will make the national debt skyrocket and leave the next generation paying the bills. Look, it's no wonder a new NBC/WSJ poll shows that just 27% of Americans think this law is a good idea. The question is, what are the other 73% of us going to do about it? [**Tell the GOP we're going to hold them accountable for this terrible legislation -- donate 2% of your refund or $2 to one of the top races of 2018 to flip the Senate blue.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc482f3/c1f7015/690c1010/11430ba3/1643178233/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tax-day?utm_source=ema_2018-04-17_tax-day&refcode=ema_2018-04-17_tax-day&utm_campaign=tax-day&utm_medium=ema") We need to find common ground on tax reform that makes Minnesota families the priority, not huge giveaways to the rich and big corporations. Instead, next year, large corporations stand to get major tax cuts -- the corporate tax rate was slashed from 35 percent to 21 percent and stays that way indefinitely. But individual tax cuts for working people will expire over the next several years. It's no surprise that corporations are the big winners from the GOP tax cuts. We know who they're working for and it's not us. The terrible tax bill is just one more blow to the middle class -- and one more sign that Republicans are working not for their constituents, but for their corporate donors. It's time to hold the GOP accountable for putting corporate interests ahead of us. [**Join the fight today, Tax Day, by donating 2% of your expected refund or $2 to take back the Senate!**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc482f3/c1f7015/690c1010/11430ba3/1643178233/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tax-day?utm_source=ema_2018-04-17_tax-day&refcode=ema_2018-04-17_tax-day&utm_campaign=tax-day&utm_medium=ema") Thanks for everything you do, Ryan Furlong

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Tax Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
Back in December, Senate Republicans rammed a vote through on their alleged "tax bill," set to give massive windfalls to Wall Street, big corporations, and the wealthiest 1% at the expense of American families.
And while Donald Trump tours the country peddling his GOP tax scam, this Tax Day, Americans are seeing the real effects of this bill.
According to a CNBC poll, only 32 percent of the public reports having more take-home pay because of the tax cuts, and more than half say they see absolutely no change in their paycheck.1
This disastrous legislation is another reminder that Maryland's working families are not a priority for Washington, which is why next year we must elect a progressive governor with the courage to ensure that our state moves forward no matter what happens in Congress.
**[We can't let the GOP get away with stripping basic provisions from working-class Americans simply to give tax breaks to billionaires. If you believe in the power of progressives to fight for tax fairness, create good-paying jobs and grow Maryland's economy, can you chip in $5 to our campaign today?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cb/7ab0e2c4/7faa9970/349a617e/4001188797/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQxNzhEIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04178D")**
Maryland families are already struggling with wages that aren't rising fast enough while paying more and more for their healthcare and housing. The last thing they need is a tax increase.
Republicans have decided to put permanent tax cuts for massive corporations ahead of protecting real American people, and this will not stand.
**[We can and must do better. Marylanders have no time to waste -- chip in $5 today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cb/7ab0e2c4/7faa9970/349a617e/4001188797/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQxNzhEIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04178D")**
Onward,
Ben

****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cb/7ab0e2c4/7faa9970/349a617e/4001188797/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQxNzhEIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04178D")****

**I support the Trump-Pence reforms that cut government red tape, cut taxes, and provide hardworking Hoosiers with bigger paychecks.**
**The Trump-Pence tax reforms are good for Hoosiers – don’t you agree?**
**[>>Take the one-question Team Pence Tax Day Survey<<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=e2306ad4b9694c4d8810f12bc1f459fb&_e=ZpvdcFcBFezuhPeslBXWFZfOQmXNkguXOnFMEhDe0vHp6WDTDJPFgTusMsURgv6uXjI2hIECm3R84dnTqLVcgegOuIw97JqsA5JyM16KjprK75MzzXG3XRJBKYuqzGMq6XyUlQXMDjlRV4BMXkVVbSJ_uBJyKDQ-4zZ46gmobaGiq17ikq55kA21e6Y4qyQikiRW0yI4MqXl5uzNZFuZJgXYF9FEq9CYdGv514N-voCx0zWWApyzIlKMr9poIyuSxcY8jdRjOkdCTBq37xFQ1x_9mb9MSKaxeRqj6HdugaJY-DYPrEfp3GtR7s003XV-R9efJcw-5DNJ5LYGJ3Npi9ht9G3w_Msq3PKc96H4Lv83pSe08bT761UhcbH0uKhC5AJEx5r9NF3Y4cYB3QtWM1-N5pPXbHoUNb9J1797J8U%3D)**

**The media STILL refuses to report on the truth about the Trump-Pence tax reforms.**

_Thanks to President Trump, Hoosiers will keep more of their hard-earned money._

While President Trump is cutting excessive red tape and regulations, the media and the liberal left are doing anything and everything they can to discredit our tax cut victory for Hoosiers.

Since the beginning of his campaign, President Trump promised to **Make America Great Again** , and now, just over a year into his presidency, **our American economy is booming thanks to his fantastic tax reforms:**

* **NEW RECORD:** the number of Americans claiming unemployment benefits has never been so low for so long
* **NEW RECORD:** the number of small business owners who say now is a good time to expand their businesses has never been so high
* Optimism within the manufacturing industry is at a **historically high level** , averaging **91.8%** in 2017 – up from **64.3%** in 2016
* Voters are recognizing President Trump is responsible for our booming economy

It’s clear **President Trump’s MAGA agenda** is returning economic prosperity to America and _restoring hope to the forgotten Hoosier men and women._ **[Do you agree?](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=e2306ad4b9694c4d8810f12bc1f459fb&_e=ZpvdcFcBFezuhPeslBXWFZfOQmXNkguXOnFMEhDe0vHp6WDTDJPFgTusMsURgv6uXjI2hIECm3R84dnTqLVcgegOuIw97JqsA5JyM16KjprK75MzzXG3XRJBKYuqzGMq6XyUlQXMDjlRV4BMXkVVbSJ_uBJyKDQ-4zZ46gmobaGiq17ikq55kA21e6Y4qyQikiRW0yI4MqXl5uzNZFuZJqStk5UiKAK-Xd6HfinROKPZYTe5upH3N1BXk1g4_HIY3HFWeBw2-gC_xeXCHu0StsshUSz2AEcQwpQrj7IlQAyN67fVcTaJUrWI2d2MtNy8brH4lxx4WjyjwzTVvSDHIUSrwQSf49ieAmjUFt79eeNR1jz_zrkvLXdRSG4Vd_N-pnmIxN6raxgZSmgW6HIilTzmaXQp7XyadepfqfYjFcs%3D)**

**[> >Yes<<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=e2306ad4b9694c4d8810f12bc1f459fb&_e=ZpvdcFcBFezuhPeslBXWFZfOQmXNkguXOnFMEhDe0vHp6WDTDJPFgTusMsURgv6uXjI2hIECm3R84dnTqLVcgegOuIw97JqsA5JyM16KjprK75MzzXG3XRJBKYuqzGMq6XyUlQXMDjlRV4BMXkVVbSJ_uBJyKDQ-4zZ46gmobaGiq17ikq55kA21e6Y4qyQikiRW0yI4MqXl5uzNZFuZJllloEp4POpyoJJgzOX2zGb4q0bDGNDAVJPYk-LZydFJMPs8gSTqK1-dLp138p-xUa5eV0OsYplzoOKmvwFOzq7DGH9_i9q37OKOzW1-ezsLpfwDr876_o4GXFp6-LzlyKxtSJPQSFTcpK2OenWbVxoe3josgAXmrb9LDylyHQsQXQRSVGBJnMr8YBQsY6eKSUvc1cbTBJqwyy2Sir95enE%3D)**

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Tune in TOMORROW: We Are EMILY 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5e04/24c69fd9/1d64183bb/188ada71/976339539/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENEP41N_digital_email_20180417_WAElivestream_inact&source=WQENEP41N_digital_email_20180417_WAElivestream_inact")
---

Peter,

Want to meet six rising stars serving in state and local office across the country?

Want to hear from Sen. Patty Murray about the impact EMILY's List had on her political career?

You can do both and more because we'll be livestreaming from the We Are EMILY Conference and Gala tomorrow.

**[Follow EMILY's List on Facebook so you can tune in to highlights from We Are EMILY tomorrow.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5e04/24c69fd9/1d64183bb/188ada72/976339539/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Follow+EMILYs+List+on+Facebook+so+you+ca&utm_campaign=WQENEP41N_digital_email_20180417_WAElivestream_inact&source=WQENEP41N_digital_email_20180417_WAElivestream_inact")**

Here's what we'll be streaming throughout the day:
* _12:10 p.m. ET_ : A panel featuring all six of our 2018 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award nominees, moderated by Zerlina Maxwell

* _1:45 p.m. ET_ : Our "Not Just Another Year of the Woman" Panel, featuring former Sen. Barbara Mikulski

* Our evening program kicks off around 7:15 p.m. ET and will feature livestreamed remarks from:
* Rep. Michelle Lujan Grisham
* Our 2018 Rising Star, Cook County, IL State's Attorney Kim Foxx
* Sen. Patty Murray
* and me too!

I'm so excited to share the stage with these remarkable women, and I hope you'll tune in.

**Make sure to like EMILY's List on Facebook to catch panels and speeches with some of our favorite pro-choice Democratic women from We Are EMILY tomorrow:**

**[https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5e04/24c69fd9/1d64183bb/188ada73/976339539/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpswwwfacebookcomemilyslist&utm_campaign=WQENEP41N_digital_email_20180417_WAElivestream_inact&source=WQENEP41N_digital_email_20180417_WAElivestream_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

P.S. Don't worry if you're busy during any of the events. The videos will be archived on our Facebook page, where you can watch them any time!

|
